chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-572 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.3078/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 5. 3. For orders on CMA No.2507/2026. 4. For orders on CMA No.2508/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026. Mr. Shahab Imam, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The grievance of the Petitioner appears to be against the Respondent No.8, which, according to the Counsel for the Petitioner, has not been registered under the Trade Organizations Act, 2013. It is stated that a Complaint has been made by the Petitioner on 20.10.2025 (Annexure “F” at Page-81 of the Court File) to the Director General, Trade Organizations followed by a Reminder dated 27.11.2025 (Annexure “G” at Page-129 of the Court File), but has not been attended to. Under the circumstances, the Petitioner may pursue such Complaint before the Director General, Trade Organizations, who we are sanguine would examine and attend to the same without undue delay, after hearing the Petitioner and all concerned. The Petition stands disposed of in such terms, alongwith all pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
